infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ParentingMyKid uses your child's location to keep them safe and alert you when they arrive at or leave safe zones.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ParentingMyKid monitors your child's location in the background for safety alerts.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ParentingMyKid allows your child to take photo proof of completed missions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ParentingMyKid allows your child to use voice check-ins for missions.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ParentingMyKid allows adding photos to the family memory gallery.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: ParentingMyKid needs background location access to monitor your child's safety.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow ParentingMyKid to access your camera for mission photo proof.
